description_long: This object is a lush, leafy green potted plant with broad, slightly wavy leaves that cascade outward in all directions. The leaves are dense, overlapping, and have a healthy, vibrant green color with some subtle variations in shade. The plant is housed in a simple, cylindrical pot that appears to be made of a light brown, unglazed material, possibly terracotta. The pot is plain, with no visible decorative elements or patterns, and has a slightly matte finish. The overall appearance suggests a well-maintained indoor plant, suitable for adding a touch of nature to urban environments. No plant identification label or tag is visible on the pot or among the foliage.
description: A dense, leafy green plant in a plain, light brown cylindrical pot, with broad, healthy leaves cascading outward. The pot is unadorned and has a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plant's dense foliage spreading evenly, with the pot mostly visible at the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the plant's outward-reaching leaves, partially obscuring the pot.
description_view_2: From this angle, the plant's leaves appear especially full and layered, with the pot only slightly visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the plant's foliage from another side, with the pot more clearly visible and leaves arching outward.
attribute_plant_species: Spathiphyllum (Peace Lily) or similar broad-leaf houseplant
